full_text:
Liu Ai 劉艾
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ai (劉艾). Chief Clerk to Dong Zhuo. Wrote annals. Liu Ai was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and the Han Dynasty.
